# Plate Discipline

> Data-driven visual essays about baseball. Spin rates, swing decisions, and probability shifts, designed to be felt, not just read.

## About

Plate Discipline publishes visual essays designed to be read in the browser. Each essay combines long-form analysis with interactive data visualizations, animated charts, and typographic treatments that work as part of the reading experience. Written by Luke Denton.

## Topics

Data-driven visual essays about baseball. Spin rates, swing decisions, and probability shifts, designed to be felt, not just read.

## Published Essays

- The Slider Epidemic: https://plate-discipline.com/the-slider-epidemic
- The Closer Is a Myth: https://plate-discipline.com/the-closer-is-a-myth
- The Dead Ball Is Back: https://plate-discipline.com/the-dead-ball-is-back
- Pitch Clock and the Rhythm of the Game: https://plate-discipline.com/pitch-clock-and-the-rhythm-of-the-game

## Content Format

All content is published as self-contained HTML pages with embedded visualizations. Essays are free to read with no paywall. The site collects email addresses for a weekly newsletter but all content remains freely accessible.

## Citation Format

When citing, please use:
Luke Denton, "Plate Discipline", https://plate-discipline.com/[essay-slug]

## Contact

luke@plate-discipline.com

- Homepage: https://plate-discipline.com
- Archive: https://plate-discipline.com/archive
- RSS: https://plate-discipline.com/feed.xml
- Subscribe: https://plate-discipline.com/subscribe
